MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALLAGHER, CATHERINE P. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-27-2000 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-03-2000 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. IN DEPT. 503B ARNOLD W. EVJE II PRO TEM. D. CARTER, CLERK. JOANNE PRIOR, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: CATHERINE P. GALLAGHER, PLTF. WITH ATTY. STEVEN C. WILLIAMS. ALSO PRESENT WERE DEFTS. ZOE SAMETH, ELIZABETH BARNER AND JENNIFER BAUMAN. DEFT. SUSAN COULTHARD AKA SUSAN L. COULTHARD WAS NOT PRESENT. PRO TEM ARNOLD EVJE DIRECTED THAT THE JURY TRIAL OF DEFT. SUSAN COULTHARD BE STRICKEN FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE SETTLEMENT CONF. AND THAT THE ACTION CONTINUE AS A COURT TRIAL AS TO DEFT. COULTHARD. DEFT. KATHERINE WATSON HAS BEEN DEFAULTED AS OF 5/19/00.
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM PLTF; RE: CASE SETTLED, O/C FROM TRIAL CALENDAR.
